{{Infobox group
| name = Damascan
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Damascan soldiers]] wear uniforms.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6">''House of Blades'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Damascan soldiers]] are considered extensions of [[Zakareth]]'s will.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] has no consideration for the safety of the [[Damascan]] people.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Damascan]] military is characterized by discipline.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c1">''City of Light'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
